description: Set up Flutter SDK and create the base Flutter project structure in /projects/sandbox/Ashta_Chamma/. Install Flutter, create the project scaffolding (lib/, test/, android/, ios/, pubspec.yaml), and verify it passes flutter analyze.
steps: Install Flutter SDK by cloning https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git -b stable to /opt/flutter and add /opt/flutter/bin to PATH
Run flutter doctor to verify installation (accept Android license warnings since no SDK)
Initialize the Flutter project in /projects/sandbox/Ashta_Chamma/ by creating pubspec.yaml with appropriate dependencies (provider for state management)
Create the standard Flutter directory structure: lib/, test/, android/, ios/ directories
Create lib/main.dart with a minimal Flutter app entry point
Create the package directory structure: lib/models/, lib/logic/, lib/ui/, lib/ui/widgets/, lib/ai/
Run flutter pub get to fetch dependencies
Run flutter analyze to confirm no errors in the base project
acceptance_criteria: Flutter SDK is installed and functional
pubspec.yaml exists with correct project name and dependencies
lib/main.dart exists and contains a valid Flutter app entry point
flutter pub get succeeds without errors
flutter analyze passes with no errors
verification: Run: export PATH=/opt/flutter/bin:$PATH && cd /projects/sandbox/Ashta_Chamma && flutter analyze
Run: export PATH=/opt/flutter/bin:$PATH && cd /projects/sandbox/Ashta_Chamma && flutter test (should pass with 0 tests or basic test)
findings: Flutter 3.44.4 stable installed at /opt/flutter. PATH must be set with export PATH=/opt/flutter/bin:$PATH before running flutter commands. Root user warning appears but does not affect functionality. Android/Chrome/Linux toolchain warnings are expected and do not impact flutter analyze or flutter test. pubspec.lock is gitignored per .gitignore. Build artifacts go to build/ which is also gitignored.
